title: Stellarity x Nullscape ~ Compatibility
body:
Addon for [Stellarity](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity) that makes it compatible with [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape).

Makes both Stellarity and Nullscape biomes generate together and uses Nullscape's terrain shaper.

Because of Stellarity's Dragon changes, Nullscape's main island has been trimmed a little to not cover Stellarity's exit portal.

## Load order
### Singleplayer
![](https://i.imgur.com/W8y69Cy.png)

Put the addon first, then either Nullscape or Stellarity. The order of those two doesn't matter, but the addon has to be above both of them.

### Multiplayer
![](https://i.imgur.com/0Si2bf3.png)

By doing `/datapack list` you can see the order in which the packs load (the order goes from the first mentioned to the last one). **Make sure the addon is listed AFTER both Nullscape and Stellarity**. You can make it load last by doing `/datapack disable <addon>` and then `/datapack enable <addon>`.
